mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, u.full_name AS studentName, COALESCE(u.student_no, u.employee_no) AS studentId, COALESCE(sr.display_name, sr.room_name) AS roomName, s.seat_code AS seatNo, r.reservation_date AS date, r.start_hour AS startHour, r.end_hour AS endHour, r.reservation_status AS status, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reservations r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id JOIN study_rooms sr ON sr.id = r.study_room_id JOIN seats s ON s.id = r.seat_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%') OR u.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%') OR s.seat_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.search}, '%'))
AND r.reservation_status = #{q.status}
AND r.reservation_date = #{q.date}
AND r.reservation_date = CURDATE()
AND r.reservation_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN reservation_date = CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayCount, SUM(CASE WHEN reservation_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND deleted_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weekCount, SUM(CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalCount FROM reservations
